title: AD Apartment
shortDescription: A compact apartment design rooted in natural materials and a calm, Nordic sensibility. Light oak woodwork runs throughout the space -from cabinetry to shelving to flooring - creating a seamless, warm backdrop. Deep green accents in textiles and tilework add depth without disrupting the quiet palette. The open living area merges cooking, dining, and lounging into one fluid zone, with built-in storage maximizing every surface. The entryway and bathrooms follow the same material logic - wood, stone, and glass in restrained, clean-lined compositions. The result is a space that feels larger than its footprint, with a consistent atmosphere of softness and order.
